rationale: The cited paper appears highly thematically aligned with the citing paper’s core framework: both use an evolutionary account involving romantic/mate-attraction motivations and persuasion/judgment effects (citing note: mating mind-sets in branding; cited note: fear vs romantic desire and heuristic persuasion).
